subcodes.first_line: O Beloved of God! The Wronged One maketh mention of thee with that from which thou shalt inhale the fragrance of God's love and the sweet perfume of His chosen ones' raiment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حبیب الله یذکرک المظلوم بما تجد منه عرف محبه الله و نفحات قمیص اولیائه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital
